$comment: EXEMPLE pédagogique · Sous-poche nurses-12h héritant de mère workers-shifts. Hérite scope général + traits partagés. Cross-ref Stepprs spec.json mechanisms · Impact absorption cushioning + Arch support engineered structure = pillars cœur pour 12h walking miles within unit + emotional toll caregiving.

validation_status._note: Example sub-pocket · validé par construction pédagogique

example_canon_showcased: Pattern parent/enfants sémantique pure v2.64 · sous-poche override seulement specificity_modifiers (trigger spécifique · context unit walking · pain miles+emotional · objection uniform shoe · vocab nursing)

identity.label: Nurses 12h shifts (hospital + clinical)
identity.$comment_label: Sous-poche spécifique nurse 12h hospital · scope plus restreint que mère workers-shifts.

demographics.$comment_age: Skew plus jeune que mère · nursing peak career 26-50 · burn out forced switch après 50.
demographics.income: $50-75k US median (RN salary range · LPN bas $35-50k)

identity.life_stage: active nursing career · 3-4 shifts par semaine 12h · souvent mère de famille + dependent care · sleep-deprived chronique

role.buyer_user_split: self-buy 85% · gift par conjoint 15% (souvent Mom's Day · birthday · cf hashtag #Nurse pour creative angle conjoint reconnaissance sacrifice)

psychology.jtbd_primary: Finir mon 12h shift sans cette douleur talon qui me suit dans mon sleep + impacte ma capacité à m'occuper de mes patients la nuit prochaine
psychology.$comment_jtbd_primary_override: Override mère · ajoute dimension emotional toll caregiving (impacte capacité prendre soin patients) · drive un angle copy différent de warehouse (responsabilité humaine vs productivité machine).
psychology.jtbd_secondary: Stay in nursing sans burn out forced retirement à 50 ans par foot/knee chronic injury · nursing = mission, pas juste job
drives: pain relief permettant focus sur patients (pas distraction douleur pendant care)
energy reserve à la maison pour family (pas crash sofa post-shift)
fears: burn out forced switch carrière (perdre mission qui définit identité)
missing shifts cost colleagues (guilt culture nursing · pas le whiner qui appelle sick)
patient safety impacted by my exhaustion (responsabilité morale lourde)
status_signals: I'm the kind who endures (nursing pride · sacrifice valorisé)
I take care of others first, but smart about my own body now (mature nurse positioning)
I know clinical evidence (proxy expertise · réceptive à 'Clinically Tested' + 'Podiatrist Recommended')
psychology.self_perception: Caregiver who finally accepts she needs care too · clinical-literate · skeptical of consumer marketing fluff mais valide endorsement professional

$comment_inheritance: Hérite legacy empty arrays de mère · sub-collection canon v2.64 Phase 4 sera spécifique sous-poche (pain miles walked unit + emotional toll caregiving + uniform white sneaker constraint = 3 pain spécifiques que mère n'a pas).

decision_process.trigger: Specific moment · plantar fasciitis flare matin après night shift OR end-of-week post-3-shifts exhaustion samedi OR collègue mention insole qui marche dans break room (peer-driven trigger nursing-spécifique vs solo trigger autres sous-poches)
decision_process.$comment_trigger_override: Override mère · ajoute peer-driven trigger break room conversation (nursing culture collectif vs warehouse solo). Drive un creative angle UGC nurse-to-nurse recommendation puissant.
evaluation_criteria: fits uniform white sneakers (Birkenstock Pro · Dansko · Hoka Bondi · constraint spécifique nursing uniform code)
endorsement clinical crédible (podiatrist + nurse-endorsed si possible · clinical literacy filter)
price reasonable mais nurse income $50-75k = moins price-sensitive que hospitality
purchase_path: Search Google 'best insole 12 hour nurse shift' OR 'plantar fasciitis insole nursing'
Lurking r/Nurses pour peer recommendations (nursing forum trust > marketing copy)
Compare 2-3 options DTC après filtering peer-validated
Purchase 1 single pair trial $27 (skeptical legacy · pas direct bundle même si nurse income soutient)
decision_process.time_to_decide: 5-14 days research · plus longue que mère average · clinical literacy = comparaison plus structurée

where_they_hang: Facebook groups Nurses Network · Nursing Solidarity · Travel Nurses
YouTube nurse-vloggers shift-day-in-life content + foot pain tutorials
content_consumed: Podiatrist explainer videos 'why nurses develop plantar fasciitis'
Comparison videos 'Birkenstock Pro vs Hoka Bondi vs adding insole'
Money-back guarantee emphasis (downside-removal pour nurse income context)
behavior.vocab_register: clinical + occupational · 12-hour shift · units · charting · admits · codes · break room · scrubs · uniform sneakers · floors miles walked
behavior.brand_relationships: Birkenstock Pro · Dansko · Hoka Bondi connu (premium nursing shoes) · Stepprs entry pour add-in insole sans switcher shoes · Dr. Scholl tried in 20s + déçue (early career generic)

key_expressions: 12-hour shifts are brutal on your feet
I walked 8 miles within the unit today
by the time I clock out my feet are screaming
the first impression is really promising (Tanya verbatim canon)
after a code my back and feet both hurt for days
voice.$comment_key_expressions: Verbatim Tanya 'first impression really promising' + '12-hour shifts' = canon cible nursing scrapé Stepprs reviews. Reformuler dans hooks creative + témoignages UGC.
voice.tone_self: professional · matter-of-fact · clinical-pragmatic · no drama mais reconnaît douleur réelle quand demande
pain_metaphors: my feet are screaming by hour 8
I walked 8 miles within the unit today
after a code my back and feet both hurt for days
my heel pain wakes me up before my alarm
solution_metaphors: I can actually focus on my patients again instead of my feet
game changer for my Birkenstock Pros

market_position.$comment_segment_size: Estimation 18% acquisition Stepprs · sous-poche cœur workers-shifts (45% mère split ≈ 18% nurses + 18% warehouse + 9% hospitality).
market_position.price_sensitivity: low-medium · nurse income $50-75k confortable pour $27-50 · accepte $48 Plantar Fasciitis Kit bundle plus facilement que hospitality
competition_alternatives: Birkenstock Pro (premium nursing shoe · pas vraiment insole concurrent · complément)
Hoka Bondi (cushioned sneaker · concurrent direct si used solo sans insole)
Powerstep Pinnacle Maxx (clinical mid-tier · concurrent direct insole)
No insole + premium shoe alone (resigned · 'shoes are enough')
market_position.differentiation_appeal: Engineered insole that ADDS to premium nursing shoes (pas remplacement Birkenstock · stack-in) · podiatrist endorsed = clinical literacy match · 800k+ customers including nurses (peer validation) · 90-day money-back annule risk pour nurse income context

specificity_modifiers.trigger_unique: Peer-driven break room conversation (collègue nurse mentionne insole qui marche · culture collective nursing vs solo trigger autres sous-poches)
specificity_modifiers.context_occupation: 12h shift hospital · walking 5-8 miles within unit per shift · codes + admits cause sprints unexpected · standing/walking ratio plus walking dominant que warehouse
pain_specific: Miles walked within unit per shift (5-8 miles cumulative · plus que warehouse 10h)
Emotional toll caregiving (douleur talon distraction quand patient critique · responsabilité morale)
Sleep impact (night shift + plantar fasciitis flare = sleep deprivation cumul)
specificity_modifiers.objection_specific: Uniform white sneaker / clog code constraint · 'doit fits dans mes Birkenstock Pros · pas remplacer · pas trop épais'
specificity_modifiers.vocab_specific: Clinical-occupational (units · charting · admits · codes · scrubs · break room) + nursing community jargon (Allnurses · travel nursing · charge nurse · float pool)
specificity_modifiers.$comment_specificity: Block explicit documentant ce qui diverge significativement de mère workers-shifts. Pattern v2.64 = mère définit scope général partagé · sous-poches stockent override deltas ici. Empêche duplication ET garde traçabilité claire.
